text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Another message of encouragement. I've
been getting them all morning.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
My family, friends, and everyone I depend on are
always there for me when I need a boost.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I need to show them my appreciation by winning
this race!
